# GitHub Copilot 指引 / Instructions

本專案的開發指引以根目錄 **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** 為單一真相（Single Source of Truth）。
The development guidelines live in **[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** at the repo root — the single source of truth.

請遵循 `AGENTS.md` 的行為原則與開發工作流。
Follow the behavior principles and development workflow in `AGENTS.md`.

> Copilot coding agent 已能原生讀取 `AGENTS.md`；此檔僅為偏好 `.github/copilot-instructions.md` 路徑的環境（如部分 VS Code Copilot Chat 版本）提供指向。
> The Copilot coding agent reads `AGENTS.md` natively; this file just points there for environments that prefer this path.
> 維護：請只更新 `AGENTS.md`，勿在此複製內容。/ Maintenance: update only `AGENTS.md`; do not copy content here.
